description_long: This is a modern, rectangular range hood with a sleek metallic finish, designed for installation above a cooking surface. The main body consists of a tall, vertical chimney section that extends upward from a wide, flat base, which serves as the canopy. The front face is smooth and unadorned, while the sides feature small, rectangular vent openings near the top for air exhaust. The base appears to have a slightly darker strip, likely housing the control panel and possibly lighting fixtures. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a uniform metallic color, typical of contemporary kitchen appliances. The structure is robust and likely constructed from stainless steel, providing both durability and a modern aesthetic.
description: A sleek, metallic range hood with a tall chimney and wide base, featuring side vents and a minimalist design. The front is smooth, with a darker strip at the base likely for controls.
description_view_0: Front view shows a smooth, flat metallic face with a wide base and no visible controls or vents.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a tall chimney and a set of small rectangular vents near the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a similar smooth metallic surface as the front, with a darker strip at the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same vent openings near the top of the chimney.
attribute_control_panel_type: Likely a touch panel or push buttons located on the darker strip at the front base; specific details not visible.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are placed on both the left and right sides near the top of the chimney section.
attribute_filter_design: No visible filter structure; likely integrated within the base canopy, possibly a mesh or baffle type.
